prompt: Add this oak tree to the park map.
prompt_refined: Edit image 2, the park map. Add a graphic of an oak tree, stylized as a black silhouette similar to image 1. Position this oak tree graphic within the large green, wooded area in the bottom-right quadrant of the map, ensuring it does not obscure any existing labels or trails.
objects: Oak tree graphic (black silhouette style, similar to image 1, positioned in the bottom-right green wooded area)
Park map background (green wooded areas, blue water bodies)
Large green, wooded area in the bottom-right quadrant
Various colored trails (e.g., green, blue, orange, yellow lines)
Map labels (e.g., "Pine Knob Loop", "I-94", "Enjoy the Ski!")
Roads (e.g., Old Entrance Road, Old Saint Joe Road)
